assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 explicitly shows builder.Services.AddBff() as the entry point

assertions.assertion: Uses ConfigureOpenIdConnect with Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType='code', and SaveTokens=true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 shows the exact fluent API: .ConfigureOpenIdConnect(options => { options.Authority=...; options.ClientId=...; options.ClientSecret=...; options.ResponseType='code'; options.SaveTokens=true; })
SKILL.md Pattern 1 explicitly shows options.Scope.Add('offline_access') with comment 'Required for refresh tokens'

assertions.assertion: Middleware order is UseRouting -> UseAuthentication -> UseBff -> UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 and Pattern 3 both show this exact ordering

assertions.assertion: Does NOT manually call AddAuthentication().AddCookie().AddOpenIdConnect() — uses the v4 fluent API instead
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly marks manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect as anti-pattern for v4
